mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (POST_ID, WRITER_ID, CONTENT, POST_IMG, LIKE_COUNT) VALUES (#{postId}, #{writerId}, #{content}, #{postImg}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET CONTENT = #{content}, POST_IMG = CASE WHEN #{postImg} IS NULL OR #{postImg} = '' THEN POST_IMG ELSE #{postImg} END WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT POST_ID AS postId, WRITER_ID AS writerId, CONTENT AS content, POST_IMG AS postImg, REG_DATE AS regDate, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount FROM post ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT POST_ID AS postId, WRITER_ID AS writerId, CONTENT AS content, POST_IMG AS postImg, REG_DATE AS regDate, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount FROM post WHERE WRITER_ID = #{writerId} ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT POST_ID AS postId, WRITER_ID AS writerId, CONTENT AS content, POST_IMG AS postImg, REG_DATE AS regDate, LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount FROM post WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment (POST_ID, WRITER_ID, CONTENT) VALUES (#{postId}, #{writerId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COMMENT_ID AS commentId, POST_ID AS postId, WRITER_ID AS writerId, CONTENT AS content, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM post_comment WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
